title: acantholimon erinaceum
intro: Acantholimon erinaceum, also known as the 'Hare's Ear', is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions. Acantholimon erinaceum is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve coughs and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, which include soothing respiratory issues and promoting skin health.
